creator: bapt@FreeBSD.org
text: It has been discussed long ago, and some people already went through working on this (we for example provided a blanket to gahr long ago to work on this issue, but he never got time to finish). The work was to entirely drop the PTHREAD_LIBS from bsd.port.mk by first remove all PTHREAD_LIBS references from the ports and then drop entirely PTHREAD_LIBS from bsd.port.mk
